feedItems.description: allocated £44.3m to Environment & Streets (≈£79 per resident)
allocated £306.8m to Adult Social Care (≈£547 per resident)
allocated £134.1m to Children's Social Care (≈£239 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £89 (5.0%) to £1867
